description: PHI-free static inventory of legacy authorization planes. This artifact grants no authority and does not prove live identity drift.

high_risk_contracts.known_gap: No common contract/assignment/qualification/authz epoch binding; downgrade omission can retain stale custom:role.
Historical actor_role values are display evidence and must never authorize an active request.
Free-form certification data has no verification authority, status, revocation, jurisdiction, or canonical version.
Role-bearing nullable-site memberships are selected with unordered findFirst semantics.
A long-lived stream retains request auth context without versioned epoch recheck.
Queued work lacks subject, tenant, assignment, qualification, contract-version, and authz-epoch binding.
PHOS role and scope planes are lossy and are not the fixed-five account model.
Platform access can project a synthetic tenant admin context and must retain target pin, purpose, TTL, and revocation.
Jobs and machines do not yet share a versioned dedicated principal/capability contract and must not impersonate fixed-five human roles.

requirements: agent-browser or approved deterministic non-browser replacement
